title: Golioth Release
description: Schema for a Golioth Release — a bundle of one or more firmware Artifacts that may be rolled out to a tagged subset of devices.

releaseTags.description: Semantic version tags assigned to this release (e.g. '1.2.0').

artifactIds.description: Identifiers of firmware artifacts included in this release.

tagIds.description: Device tags this release targets. Devices with at least one matching tag are eligible.

rollout.description: Whether the release is currently being rolled out to devices.

rolledOutAt.description: Timestamp at which the release was rolled out (null when not yet rolled out).
